{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Backend Developer (Java)",
  "description": "Polaris Digitech Limited is a location intelligence firm that specializes in providing data, software and decision support services to fulfill its client&rsquo;s strategies and management needs through the development and deployment of Geographic Information Systems (GIS).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Backend Developer (Java)
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking to employ an experienced Backend developer who will be responsible for working on applications at the backend collaborating with other team members to build scalable applications for various sectors.


Qualification &amp; Experience


	BSc. / HND in Computer Science or any related discipline
	Minimum of 2 years of work experience in a similar capacity.
	Core Technical Skills: Programming Languages like
	JavaScript
	Java (Spring Boot)
	API Development &amp; Integration:
	RESTful API design and development
	Experience with GraphQL is a plus
	API documentation.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@polarisdigitech.net&nbsp;using &quot;Backend Developer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Backend Developer (Java) Job at Polaris Digitech Limited




        
    

        
        Polaris Digitech Limited is a location intelligence firm that specializes in providing data, software and decision support services to fulfill its client’s strategies and management needs through the development and deployment of Geographic Information Systems (GIS).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Backend Developer (Java)
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking to employ an experienced Backend developer who will be responsible for working on applications at the backend collaborating with other team members to build scalable applications for various sectors.


Qualification & Experience


	BSc. / HND in Computer Science or any related discipline
	Minimum of 2 years of work experience in a similar capacity.
	Core Technical Skills: Programming Languages like
	JavaScript
	Java (Spring Boot)
	API Development & Integration:
	RESTful API design and development
	Experience with GraphQL is a plus
	API documentation.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Backend Developer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Telemarketer Team Lead",
  "description": "Firstfruit Housing Limited is a real estate development and investment company with focus on excellent customer services and innovations driven by our young, exceptional and visionary team.

We are committed to solving housing needs, excellent infrastructures and providing good investment opportunities that will guarantee return on investment for our clientele. We are building a happy community of home owners and real estate investors through partnerships, project locations, sustainable industry approach and excellent clientele satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Telemarketer Team Lead

Job Location:&nbsp;Jabi, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Lead, supervise, and motivate the telemarketing team to meet and exceed daily, weekly, and monthly targets
	Assign tasks, set performance goals, and monitor team productivity
	Train, coach, and mentor telemarketers on sales techniques, customer engagement, and product knowledge
	Monitor calls to ensure quality standards, compliance, and professionalism
	Handle escalated customer complaints and complex inquiries
	Prepare daily/weekly/monthly performance reports for management
	Track KPIs such as conversion rates, call volumes, and revenue targets
	Develop scripts and improve calling strategies for better results
	Conduct regular team meetings and performance reviews
	Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to align campaigns and objectives
	Ensure accurate documentation and CRM updates
	Recommend process improvements to increase efficiency and customer satisfaction


Qualifications / Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or related field (or&nbsp;equivalent experience)
	3-5 years of experience in telemarketing, call center, or sales roles
	Minimum of 1-2 years of supervisory or team lead experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV in PDF to:&nbsp;careers@firstfruithousing.org&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Telemarketer Team Lead Job at Firstfruit Housing Limited




        
    

        
        Firstfruit Housing Limited is a real estate development and investment company with focus on excellent customer services and innovations driven by our young, exceptional and visionary team.

We are committed to solving housing needs, excellent infrastructures and providing good investment opportunities that will guarantee return on investment for our clientele. We are building a happy community of home owners and real estate investors through partnerships, project locations, sustainable industry approach and excellent clientele satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Telemarketer Team Lead

Job Location: Jabi, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Responsibilities


	Lead, supervise, and motivate the telemarketing team to meet and exceed daily, weekly, and monthly targets
	Assign tasks, set performance goals, and monitor team productivity
	Train, coach, and mentor telemarketers on sales techniques, customer engagement, and product knowledge
	Monitor calls to ensure quality standards, compliance, and professionalism
	Handle escalated customer complaints and complex inquiries
	Prepare daily/weekly/monthly performance reports for management
	Track KPIs such as conversion rates, call volumes, and revenue targets
	Develop scripts and improve calling strategies for better results
	Conduct regular team meetings and performance reviews
	Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to align campaigns and objectives
	Ensure accurate documentation and CRM updates
	Recommend process improvements to increase efficiency and customer satisfaction


Qualifications / Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or related field (or equivalent experience)
	3-5 years of experience in telemarketing, call center, or sales roles
	Minimum of 1-2 years of supervisory or team lead experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV in PDF to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Recruiter",
  "description": "King and Sky Beauty Limited is a beauty and wellness services company, dedicated to delivering advanced, personalised health and beauty treatments.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Recruiter

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and results-driven Recruiter with at least 2 years of professional recruitment experience to manage the full recruitment lifecycle across multiple brands within our Group.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for sourcing, screening, evaluating, and onboarding qualified candidates while ensuring recruitment processes remain efficient, structured, and compliant with best practices.


This role supports recruitment activities across:


	A health and wellness IV therapy clinic
	A virtual assistant services company providing Nigerian talent to international businesses
	A talent sourcing, training, and placement organisation serving the African market.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage the end-to-end recruitment process from job intake to onboarding
	Source, screen, and evaluate candidates using structured recruitment methods
	Conduct interviews and ensure only qualified candidates proceed through each stage
	Work with hiring managers to define role requirements and candidate qualification criteria
	Maintain recruitment records and ensure compliance with hiring standards.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychology, or a related field
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in recruitment or talent acquisition
	Completion of NYSC is mandatory
	Strong knowledge of recruitment best practices, screening methods, and interviewing techniques
	Excellent attention to detail and strong organizational skills
	Ability to manage multiple hiring pipelines and meet recruitment timelines.


Remote Work Requirement:


	This is a fully remote role.
	Applicants must have reliable internet access, stable electricity, a functional computer, and appropriate backup solutions to ensure uninterrupted productivity.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Note


	A detailed job description outlining full responsibilities, expectations, remuneration, and performance metrics is linked below.
	Candidates are encouraged to review the document before applying.

Recruiter Job at King and Sky Beauty Limited




        
    

        
        King and Sky Beauty Limited is a beauty and wellness services company, dedicated to delivering advanced, personalised health and beauty treatments.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Recruiter

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and results-driven Recruiter with at least 2 years of professional recruitment experience to manage the full recruitment lifecycle across multiple brands within our Group.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for sourcing, screening, evaluating, and onboarding qualified candidates while ensuring recruitment processes remain efficient, structured, and compliant with best practices.


This role supports recruitment activities across:


	A health and wellness IV therapy clinic
	A virtual assistant services company providing Nigerian talent to international businesses
	A talent sourcing, training, and placement organisation serving the African market.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage the end-to-end recruitment process from job intake to onboarding
	Source, screen, and evaluate candidates using structured recruitment methods
	Conduct interviews and ensure only qualified candidates proceed through each stage
	Work with hiring managers to define role requirements and candidate qualification criteria
	Maintain recruitment records and ensure compliance with hiring standards.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychology, or a related field
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in recruitment or talent acquisition
	Completion of NYSC is mandatory
	Strong knowledge of recruitment best practices, screening methods, and interviewing techniques
	Excellent attention to detail and strong organizational skills
	Ability to manage multiple hiring pipelines and meet recruitment timelines.


Remote Work Requirement:


	This is a fully remote role.
	Applicants must have reliable internet access, stable electricity, a functional computer, and appropriate backup solutions to ensure uninterrupted productivity.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Note


	A detailed job description outlining full responsibilities, expectations, remuneration, and performance metrics is linked below.
	Candidates are encouraged to review the document before applying.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Van Sales Representative",
  "description": "The Impeccable Skills Company is a professional services organization in Nigeria specializing in Business Management Advisory and Human Resource consulting. We provide business support services that help organizations achieve their goals, optimize resources, and enhance value creation, sustainability, and competitiveness. Our mission is to enable organizations to build adaptive, growth-oriented teams, foster collaboration, and implement ethical, evidence-based solutions. With a &quot;CAN-DO-AND-MAKE-IT-HAPPEN&quot; philosophy, we are committed to future-proofing business systems and promoting sustainable practices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Van Sales Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja / Maryland / Agege Axis &amp; Isolo / Mushin / Surulere Axis - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Van Sales Executive will be responsible for lifting stock from the warehouse and selling directly to assigned outlets within the designated territories.
	This role requires integrity, excellent customer service skills, and the ability to reconcile sales accounts accurately.


Key Responsibilities


	Meet monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets.
	Develop and maintain customer relationships through regular engagement.
	Demonstrate and present product offerings to customers and trade partners.
	Collect payments and handle financial transactions accurately.
	Complete all paperwork or use sales automation tools related to sales transactions.
	Implement promotional activities and strategies to drive sales.
	Monitor competitor activities and suggest counter-strategies.
	Report daily/weekly sales performance and customer feedback to management.
	Ensure proper care and usage of company vehicles and stock.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in van sales, FMCG sales, or direct trade sales.
	Strong interpersonal, negotiation, and communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and manage time efficiently.
	Valid driver&rsquo;s license with a clean driving record.
	Basic understanding of financial transactions and sales reconciliation.


Competencies:


	Results-driven with strong sales orientation.
	Integrity and high ethical standards.
	Problem-solving skills and ability to handle customer complaints effectively.
	Team player with a proactive attitude.


Salary
N250,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@theimpeccableskills.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Van Sales Representative Job at the Impeccable Skills Company




        
    

        
        The Impeccable Skills Company is a professional services organization in Nigeria specializing in Business Management Advisory and Human Resource consulting. We provide business support services that help organizations achieve their goals, optimize resources, and enhance value creation, sustainability, and competitiveness. Our mission is to enable organizations to build adaptive, growth-oriented teams, foster collaboration, and implement ethical, evidence-based solutions. With a "CAN-DO-AND-MAKE-IT-HAPPEN" philosophy, we are committed to future-proofing business systems and promoting sustainable practices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Van Sales Representative
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ikeja / Maryland / Agege Axis & Isolo / Mushin / Surulere Axis - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Van Sales Executive will be responsible for lifting stock from the warehouse and selling directly to assigned outlets within the designated territories.
	This role requires integrity, excellent customer service skills, and the ability to reconcile sales accounts accurately.


Key Responsibilities


	Meet monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets.
	Develop and maintain customer relationships through regular engagement.
	Demonstrate and present product offerings to customers and trade partners.
	Collect payments and handle financial transactions accurately.
	Complete all paperwork or use sales automation tools related to sales transactions.
	Implement promotional activities and strategies to drive sales.
	Monitor competitor activities and suggest counter-strategies.
	Report daily/weekly sales performance and customer feedback to management.
	Ensure proper care and usage of company vehicles and stock.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in van sales, FMCG sales, or direct trade sales.
	Strong interpersonal, negotiation, and communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and manage time efficiently.
	Valid driver’s license with a clean driving record.
	Basic understanding of financial transactions and sales reconciliation.


Competencies:


	Results-driven with strong sales orientation.
	Integrity and high ethical standards.
	Problem-solving skills and ability to handle customer complaints effectively.
	Team player with a proactive attitude.


Salary
N250,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
